title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Lead the development of next-generation user interfaces using React and TypeScript. Focus on performance, scalability, and modern web standards. Minimum 5 years of experience required.

title: Data Scientist (Machine Learning)
description: Build and deploy machine learning models to solve complex business problems. Proficiency in Python, Pandas, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP) is essential.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Design intuitive and aesthetically pleasing user experiences for mobile and web applications. Must have a strong portfolio and expertise in Figma or Sketch.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyze market trends, prepare financial forecasts, and support budget planning for investment portfolios. Strong Excel and communication skills required.

title: HR Specialist
description: Manage employee relations, recruitment, and onboarding processes. Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.

title: Marketing Manager
description: Develop and execute integrated marketing campaigns across digital and traditional channels. Experience with SEO/SEM and content strategy is a plus.

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Entry-level position focusing on building and maintaining backend services using Node.js and MongoDB. Great opportunity for recent graduates.

title: Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate daily operational activities, manage inventory, and optimize supply chain processes.
